subcategory: glass-morphism scroll-stacking cards with GSAP animation
use_cases: Displaying feature highlights with a progressive reveal as users scroll through content
Showcasing pricing tiers in a visually engaging stacked card format
Presenting portfolio projects or testimonials with scroll-triggered animations
Creating an immersive product showcase with depth and layering effects
Building content sections that respond dynamically to scroll position
ai_summary: A glass-morphism card component featuring scroll-triggered stacking animations powered by GSAP ScrollTrigger. Cards progressively scale down as users scroll through, creating a 3D depth effect with frosted glass aesthetics. The animation interpolates card scale from full size to a calculated minimum based on card position, with transform origin set to center top for realistic stacking behavior.
